summary: Big build session on the gift SYSTEM + per-level theming. Grew the power-up set from 5 to 8 (fireball/piercing #6, safety-net-era, extra-life instant +1 #8), added per-level background themes (outrun sun + palette per stage) and per-level sound (tonal gameplay sounds transpose per stage). Capped it with a WEIGHTED gift pool (GIFT_WEIGHT + pickGiftType replaces equal-weight GIFT_POOL): routine buffs common, premium/flashy gifts rare, skull present but not overwhelming (gun/wide ~15%, slow ~13%, skull ~11% ... life ~5%). Closes the long-carried '1-in-N drops is a skull' thread from session 183. tsc -b + vite build green (67.11 kB gzip). All committed + pushed to github.com/MotiTheWizerd/breakout.

open_threads: GIFT_DROP_CHANCE still at 0.38 (elevated playtest value; comment flags normal ~0.18) — decide ship value
Skull odds now tuned via GIFT_WEIGHT (~11%) — playtest to confirm the feel is right
*.tsbuildinfo tracked in git — could gitignore + untrack
More gift ideas: safety net (one-time bottom shield), sticky/catch paddle, laser sweep
No browser tool on Claude side — verification is build + logic + Moti's screenshots, not automated playtest
